subject: Hold Slice A for Fronded GO/BLOCK
body: Pearly controller update: visible proof report received. Hold commit/index activity until Fronded completes the read-only post-change GO/BLOCK pass on your exact Slice A paths. If Fronded returns GO and Embered confirms queue clear, I will route the commit window with exact pathspecs. Keep the current claims live and do not broaden into app.tsx, panes.tsx, controller.ts, or tui-app.unit.test.ts.
